sentences.english: My neighbor has a big brown dog named Charlie.
sentences.korean: 이웃에 찰리라는 큰 갈색 개가 있어요.

sentences.english: Every morning Charlie barks when I walk past their house.
sentences.korean: 매일 아침 그 집 앞을 지나가면 찰리가 짖어요.

sentences.english: At first I was scared of him.
But one day the owner let me pet him and he licked my hand.
sentences.korean: 하지만 어느 날 주인이 쓰다듬게 해줬는데 내 손을 핥았어요.

sentences.english: Now we are good friends and I give him a treat every day.
sentences.korean: 이제 우리는 좋은 친구이고 매일 간식을 줘요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: History Lecture — The Fall of the Berlin Wall
